title: Pickaxe AI
body:
Minimalist AI Pickaxes is a clean and modern Minecraft texture pack focused on simplicity and consistency.
Each pickaxe texture is redesigned in a minimalist pixel-art style, keeping the vanilla feel while improving clarity, contrast, and visual balance.

This texture pack was created with the help of artificial intelligence, combining AI-assisted design with manual refinement to achieve a polished and cohesive look.
Perfect for players who want a subtle but fresh visual upgrade without breaking the original Minecraft aesthetic.
